name: Thunderwave
description: A wave of thunderous force sweeps out from you. Each creature in a 15-foot Cube originating from you must make a Constitution save. On a failed save, the creature takes 2d8 Thunder damage and is pushed 10 feet away from you. On a successful save, it takes half as much damage and isn't pushed. In addition, unsecured objects in the area are also pushed 10 feet, and the spell emits a thunderous boom audible out to 300 feet.
scaling: The damage increases by 1d8 for each spell slot level above 1.
